description: You are a genetic engineer documenting a subcloning strategy using the classic pUC19 vector. Open the pUC19 plasmid GenBank file at ~/UGENE_Data/cloning/pUC19.gb and annotate the sequence with EcoRI, BamHI, and HindIII restriction sites. Generate a circular plasmid map displaying the CDS features (bla, lacZ) and the three restriction sites. Export the circular view as an image to ~/UGENE_Data/cloning/results/pUC19_map.png. Create a text report at ~/UGENE_Data/cloning/results/map_details.txt listing the exact genomic coordinates for the EcoRI, BamHI, and HindIII cut sites.
